narrative:
Highland Heights-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 764 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points.
